## Summary

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Site content / SEO
- [ ] Frontend design / interaction
- [ ] Cloudflare Pages Function / API
- [ ] Database / migration
- [ ] Operations console / client portal
- [ ] Documentation / launch checklist
- [ ] Other:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual review of FR and EN pages when public content changed
- [ ] Not applicable; explain why:

## Privacy and compliance

- [ ] No personal address, private name, secrets, access codes, client data or credentials were added
- [ ] No analytics event sends names, emails, phone numbers, messages or access codes
- [ ] Operator routes and API changes preserve Cloudflare Access / server-side protections
- [ ] Public claims are accurate and do not invent certifications, guarantees or lab capabilities

## Brand and content checks

- [ ] French-first content remains clear and professional
- [ ] English page parity was updated when needed
- [ ] Public copy avoids AI/bot positioning and keeps automation behind the scenes
- [ ] Design stays within the locked NEXURADATA brand system

## Deployment notes

- [ ] `release-cloudflare/` was regenerated by `npm run build` if source files changed
- [ ] Required dashboard steps are documented, if any
- [ ] No new environment variables or secrets are required
